title: Optimize contains_duplicates
description: Test-only duplicate detector fixture with deterministic correctness checks and a real benchmark.
baseline_summary: Nested-loop duplicate detection with O(n^2) behavior.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher speedup is better. This task maximizes runtime gain over the checked-in baseline.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. Preserve contains_duplicates(values) semantics and return a boolean.
